title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Gaurs Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Gaurs Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Gaurs Group has an exciting opening for a Sales Manager at our Howrah office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Gaurs Group:
Gaurs Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Title Search

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Gaurs Group!
